eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Dolores, CO; at 1:46 PM on JUL 3, 2026 Effective until 2:46 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: ZONE 7 CHANGING TO SET STATUS-DOLORES CANYON TO CR 16 AND CR CR P TO COUNTY LINE.
